task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR dashboard or main calendar interface is visible, indicating a successful login with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the original appointment for Jayson Fadel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar or patient record shows an existing appointment for 'Jayson Fadel' scheduled for tomorrow (1 day from the current system date) at 10:00 AM.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the appointment edit interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Edit Appointment' or similar dialog box is open for Jayson Fadel, showing the appointment details.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent changed the appointment date and time to the target values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the edit dialog, the date field is set to 2 days from the current system date, and the time field is set to 14:30 or 2:30 PM. The duration should remain unchanged (30 minutes).

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment was successfully saved at the new time slot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar view for the date 2 days from today shows Jayson Fadel's appointment scheduled at 2:30 PM (14:30) and ending at 3:00 PM (15:00), confirming the 30-minute duration.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to reschedule the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenEMR web interface (clicking calendar slots, typing in form fields) rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database queries to alter the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL commands, curl requests, or script executions modifying the OpenEMR database directly.

integrity.description: Verify the appointment was actually updated in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final calendar view genuinely reflects the updated appointment slot within the OpenEMR interface, rather than just text typed into a notepad or a mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Jayson Fadel (PID: 3). Original appointment time: 10:00:00, 1 day from the current date. Target appointment time: 14:30:00 (2:30 PM), 2 days from the current date. Expected appointment duration: 1800 seconds (30 minutes).
